allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8791 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; "stopped PID\(s\): $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { "no listener on 8791" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8791/terrain.html -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing | Out-Null; "still up" } catch { "server down" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8791 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; "server stopped" } else { "already stopped" })
